title:
Tairawhiti Freshwater Catchment Plan boundaries
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## Tairawhiti Freshwater Catchment Plan boundaries
Shapefiles of the seven freshwater planning catchment areas being used in the Tairawhiti Gisborne region. As shown on the map on this page: https://www.gdc.govt.nz/environment/rivers,-water-and-wetlands/our-rivers/catchment-plans
The forestry industry and industries, land managers, catchment groups and the community knowing which freshwater catchment planning area their land or waterway of interest lies in.
Making the data accessible and useable by the community

### Response from Gisborne District Council
Status Request received
Comments data available here: https://geoportal-gizzy.opendata.arcgis.com/datasets/5fe5a4674b814e14ad8f5bdedc2c1946_0/explore

#### Likely Source Agency
Gisborne District Council
